concerns.text: SC-015 item (2) states 'format validation pass rate meets acceptable standards' without a quantitative threshold. FR-002 defines valid formats (DT code, braid word) but SC-015 should specify pass rate ≥95% to match other metrics (null <5%, zero duplicates).

SC-001 states 'Required invariant fields...must have high completeness' without a percentage threshold. SC-015 defines ≥95% for null percentage - SC-001 should reference this same threshold for consistency and measurability.
FR-001 states 'up to a specified threshold' without explicitly stating the threshold value (13 per spec context). Should read 'up to 13' for direct verifiability without cross-referencing.
